sentences.text: Thank you for calling investors management company our office hours are Monday through Thursday from eight, AM till five PM and Friday eight, AM till two PM. If you know your party's extension please dial it now, otherwise press pound for a dial by name directory or press zero for the operator welcome to the directory please enter the first three letters of your party's last name using your touchtone key M a N C Y space C O L L I N G W O O D if this is the person you are looking for press one now other.

I'm sure sure that's that's fine. I guess with that being said, I'm sure you're really busy running around and traveling things like that will be able to put something tentatively down and I can always just call back to confirm.

I don't I don't know it's really up in the air right now can I just take your number.

Hi, Nancy, my name is Mitch. I am with rentable the reason for the call. We have a tool within the application, that's able to prequalify your lead. So the leads that you are getting to the properties that you manage or more likely to convert from that standpoint. I'd like to set some time on your calendar just to go through a brief demonstration should take about fifteen to twenty minutes.
